appraisal_events.evidence: Ma tante est la nièce de votre amie Mme de Villeparisis, elle a été élevée par elle, et a épousé son cousin ... le duc de Guermantes actuel.
appraisal_events.explanation: By explicitly linking Mme de Villeparisis as aunt and guardian within the Guermantes kin network culminating in the current duke, Robert confers social prestige on her through close association with the ducal house.

status_effects.explanation: Her standing is locally elevated by being positioned as a close kin and formative figure to members of the Guermantes, including the present duke.
